name: 1Password Connect
description: 1Password Connect provides programmatic access to your 1Password vaults and secrets. Use this API to retrieve, create, and manage vault items like passwords, API keys, and secure notes from your applications.

capabilities.name: vaults_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all vaults accessible to your Connect server.

capabilities.name: vaults_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details about a specific vault by its UUID.

capabilities.name: items_list
capabilities.description: List all items in a specific vault with optional filtering by title or tag.

capabilities.name: items_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve full details of a specific item including all fields and secret values.

capabilities.name: items_create
capabilities.description: Create a new item in a vault such as a login, password, API credential, or secure note.

capabilities.name: items_update
capabilities.description: Replace an entire item in a vault with new data.

capabilities.name: items_patch
capabilities.description: Apply partial updates to an item using JSON Patch operations.

capabilities.name: items_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete an item from a vault.

capabilities.name: files_list
capabilities.description: List all file attachments associated with an item.

capabilities.name: files_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata for a specific file attachment on an item.

capabilities.name: files_get_content
capabilities.description: Download the raw binary content of a file attachment.

capabilities.name: activity_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of API requests made to the Connect server for auditing.

capabilities.name: health_check
capabilities.description: Query the state of the Connect server and its service dependencies.

capabilities.name: heartbeat
capabilities.description: Simple ping to check whether the Connect server is active.

capabilities.name: metrics_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve Prometheus-format metrics from the Connect server.
